testcase.name: testGenerarPreOrden[standard_user, secret_sauce, John, Doe, 12345](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "checkout-step-two". Current url: "https://www.saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html" (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.138, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50675}, goog:processID: 5364, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50675/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.138, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 33dcfb94372354d345a41720de32aaf2

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "checkout-step-two".
